title: List an item | eBay
memory: I have reached the "Find a match" (identify) page on eBay, which is a pre-listing step where users select a product from the library. This page contains several interactive buttons for category selection and product attribute filtering, but it is not the full listing creation form yet.

extract.query: Document all visible interactive elements including buttons for categories, filters (Brand, Size, Style Code, Model, Color, Release Year), and the 'Continue without match' button. Note labels and structure.
